title: Mannitol
buzzwords: IV agent given in the ICU
Raises serum osmolality without entering cells
Pulls water from brain into bloodstream
Freely filtered, poorly reabsorbed sugar alcohol
Emergent therapy for elevated intracranial pressure
Causes Na+ and water diuresis at proximal tubule
Risks volume overload if GFR is low

title: Pharmacologic Urea
buzzwords: Increases free water excretion in the nephron
Filtered into nephron, draws water into tubule
Treats water excess from inappropriate ADH
Endogenous nitrogenous waste given as a drug
